UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Pilots and crew authorized to interact with the flight console

username.description: Unique display name of the pilot

items.description: Checklist of staging checkpoints and completion state

savedLogs.description: Logged CapCom messages saved locally to cockpit

userId.description: UID linked to the authenticated user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last sync run

/profiles/{profileId}.description: Store personal cabins and checklist states associated with authenticated UIDs
